definition: Sum of monthly-filing PL across reporting vehicles.
secondary_source: ANBIMA press releases for external reconciliation

definition: Participant PL divided by total gross FIDC PL at each date.
universe: All monthly reporting vehicles grouped to economic participant
limitations: Provider migration can move PL without fundraising.

definition: Same share formula with dated role reconstruction for the prior date.
inclusions: cad_fi_hist, dated offers, then current-role fallback
exclusions: No silent imputation beyond flagged fallback
primary_source: CVM cadastro history and monthly filing
limitations: Prior-date dated evidence covers only about one-third of PL.

definition: Share by largest reported receivables category in each month.
primary_source: CVM monthly FIDC filing, receivables tables
limitations: A move may be a dominant-balance change, not a legal reclassification.

definition: Registered valid primary public-distribution volume by disclosed role.
formula: participant primary volume / total primary volume
period: Two equal trailing-12-month windows ending May 2025 and May 2026
limitations: Registered amount is not necessarily cash settled or outstanding PL.

definition: Unique high-confidence closing-announcement tables after semantic deduplication.
universe: Closing announcements with parseable Annex N allocation tables
exclusions: Duplicate semantic copies and lower-confidence parses
secondary_source: Monthly filing X.1/X.1.1 for stock cross-check
limitations: Accounts are not unique CPF/CNPJ; disclosure is a selected offer subset.

definition: Closing amount allocated by each category's share of subscribed quotas.
universe: Parsed-high offers with amount and quota totals
exclusions: Offers without amount or quota denominator
limitations: Not disclosed cash allocation; quota prices may differ by class.

definition: Named cedent/originator evidence accepted by the document curation pipeline.
universe: Local document corpus, not all CVM FIDCs
primary_source: CVM/Fundos.NET regulations, assemblies and offer documents
limitations: Non-random document coverage; linked PL is not additive across cedents.

definition: High-confidence accepted sacado evidence after fund/role false-positive exclusions.
limitations: Coverage is too small for a market ranking or concentration conclusion.

definition: Valid public offers classified as secondary by CVM.
limitations: This is not exchange/OTC turnover or time-to-sell.

definition: Median time between actual trades by quota series.
limitations: Not measurable from free CVM/ANBIMA open data currently loaded.
